entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS EVENING, THEN A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
PATCHY FOG AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH THIS EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
PATCHY FOG AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS AROUND 60

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS AROUND 80
